name: codex-trace-miner
description: Trace Miner packages routed skills, hooks, patterns, docs, MCP context, and evals for safer Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Mine trace patterns into safer Codex workflows
interface.longDescription: Trace Miner helps Codex route tasks, study public trace sources safely, extract reusable behavior patterns, and validate workflow changes without copying leaked prompts, raw chain-of-thought, or raw trace rows. It bundles concise workflow skills, conservative hooks, read-only context MCP tools, structured patterns, and before/after evals.
defaultPrompt: Use context-router to choose CodeGraph, Serena, Context7, MCP, or fallback.
Use fusion-orchestrator only when subagents reduce real risk.
Use trace-researcher to study these sources.
